ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (M/F) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area where the customer resides (Urban/Rural) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for shopping (e.g., Phone_Android, Tablet_iOS) */,
  "shopping_cart_type" TEXT /* Type of shopping cart used (e.g., Browser, App) */,
  "email_ad_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of email ads received (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the customer (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer (e.g., Gold, Silver, None) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., Email, SMS, Phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spending" (
  "spending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spending entry */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "equipment_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on equipment */,
  "apparel_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on apparel */,
  "footwear_spend" REAL /* Amount spent on footwear */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent across all categories */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spending_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shopping_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shopping behavior entry */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "shopping_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of shopping session in minutes */,
  "time_of_shopping" TEXT /* Time of shopping (e.g., 6:00 PM - 12:00 AM) */,
  "number_of_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews written by the customer */,
  "order_to_delivery" INTEGER /* Average time from order to delivery in days */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., BNPL, eWallet) */,
  "app_discounts" TEXT /* Indicates if the customer uses app discounts (Y/N) */,
  "app_tenure" INTEGER /* Number of months the customer has been using the app */,
  "app_referral" INTEGER /* Number of referrals made by the customer */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of each order placed */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Rate of returns for orders placed */,
  "coupon_usage" TEXT /* Indicates if the customer uses coupons (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_behavior_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., BNPL, eWallet) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping used (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the review has been responded to by the company (Y/N) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Equipment, Apparel, Footwear) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on reviews */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
